mean_cn: v.给（书等）附参考资料；  n.提及
mean_en: a note in a book that tells you where a particular piece of information comes from
sentence: He referenced the idea of his colleague before starting his own project.
sentence_trans: 在开始做项目之前，他参考了一下同事的想法。
word_etyma: re再次 + fer带来，拿来 + ence名词后缀 → 再次拿来用的 → reference参考；引证
